name: remote_generalist
description: Remote generalist with full-stack skills — tests remote filtering and broader role matching

jobs.title: Backend Engineer
jobs.description: Build features for GitLab's DevOps platform. Work with Ruby on Rails, Go, and PostgreSQL. Fully remote with async communication.

jobs.title: Software Engineer, Backend
jobs.description: Join Notion's backend team. Design and build APIs, data pipelines, and infrastructure. TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL. Remote-friendly.

jobs.title: Software Engineer
jobs.description: Help build Linear, the issue tracking tool for modern software teams. Work across the stack with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL.

jobs.title: Backend Engineer, API
jobs.description: Design and build Stripe's API infrastructure. Work with Java, Ruby, Scala, and PostgreSQL. Remote-first team. 2+ years experience.

jobs.title: Senior Backend Engineer
jobs.description: Senior backend engineer for Postman's API platform. Lead design of distributed systems. Node.js, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL. Remote.

jobs.title: Frontend Engineer
jobs.description: Build the Next.js platform and Vercel dashboard. Work with React, TypeScript, and WebAssembly. Remote team.

jobs.title: Software Engineer
jobs.description: Build cloud products at Atlassian. Use Java, Spring Boot, and AWS. Remote-first with offices worldwide. 2+ years.

jobs.title: Principal Architect
jobs.description: Define the technical architecture vision for Stripe's payments platform. 15+ years experience. Lead cross-team technical strategy.

jobs.title: Engineering Manager
jobs.description: Lead a team of backend engineers at Notion. Drive technical roadmap, mentor engineers, conduct performance reviews. 8+ years experience.

jobs.title: HR Operations Specialist
jobs.description: Manage HR operations for a growing remote startup. Handle onboarding, payroll, and compliance. 3+ years HR experience.
